articles.headline: LA mayoral race heads to a November runoff against Mayor Bass
articles.summary: With ~23% county turnout, Spencer Pratt and Nithya Raman are the likeliest challengers to incumbent Mayor Karen Bass; eight City Council seats were on the ballot.

articles.headline: World Cup comes to SoFi Stadium with fan zones across the city
articles.summary: LA co-hosts the tournament with games at SoFi and fan events at the Coliseum, Union Station and the Original Farmers Market.

articles.headline: DATALAND, the first Museum of AI Arts, opens in Downtown LA
articles.summary: Refik Anadol Studio opens DATALAND at the Gehry-designed Grand LA, a marquee addition to the downtown cultural scene.

articles.headline: Homelessness and housing costs dominate the City Council contests
articles.summary: Council and school-board races turn on homelessness response, housing supply and affordability across LA County.
